vocab.meaning: hoạt động theo đuổi cá nhân/độc lập
vocab.example: Reading was my favorite solitary pursuit, allowing me to dive into fictional worlds for hours on end.

vocab.meaning: trí tưởng tượng không giới hạn
vocab.example: With our unbridled imagination, a simple cardboard box could be transformed into a high-tech spaceship.

vocab.meaning: thích thú/tận hưởng một cách say mê
vocab.example: I used to revel in the rainy season, as it meant we could go outside and splash in the muddy puddles.

vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm thông qua xúc giác
vocab.example: Working with clay was a wonderful tactile experience that sparked my early interest in sculpture.
Driven by an innate curiosity, I spent much of my youth taking apart old clocks to see how they functioned.

vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách
vocab.example: During my formative years, I was obsessed with collecting rare stamps from all over the globe.

vocab.meaning: chuyến phiêu lưu ngoài trời (thường là mạo hiểm/nghịch ngợm)
vocab.example: Our neighborhood was the stage for many outdoor escapades, from climbing trees to exploring hidden trails.
Building elaborate Lego structures was a fantastic way to nurture creativity and spatial awareness.

vocab.meaning: đòi hỏi nhiều thể lực/vất vả
vocab.example: Playing football until dusk was physically taxing, but it gave us a great sense of camaraderie.

vocab.meaning: niềm vui thuần khiết/không bị gò bó
vocab.example: I remember the unfettered joy of riding my bicycle downhill with the wind rushing past my face.
